$notes.orphan_writer_feature: At (3,7), the spec requires activation properties to be paired with the corresponding feature in writerFeatures. Writing an activation property for a feature absent from writerFeatures is invalid committed state.

cases.name: generated_columns_create_table_1_3_fails
cases.description: Creating a (1,3) table with a delta.generationExpression column fails: generatedColumns requires minWriterVersion>=4.

cases.name: generated_columns_create_table_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_schema_fails
cases.description: Creating a (3,7) table with a delta.generationExpression column but generatedColumns absent from writerFeatures fails.

cases.name: generated_columns_empty_commit_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_schema_fails
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7) table with a delta.generationExpression column but generatedColumns absent from writerFeatures fails.

cases.name: generated_columns_create_table_1_4_with_schema
cases.description: Creating a (1,4) table with a delta.generationExpression column metadata succeeds: generatedColumns are always supported at writer version 4.

cases.name: generated_columns_read_snapshot_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_schema
cases.description: Reading a (3,7) table with a delta.generationExpression column but generatedColumns absent from writerFeatures succeeds; generatedColumns is writer-only.

cases.name: generated_columns_supported_not_active_empty_commit_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7)+[generatedColumns] table without any delta.generationExpression column succeeds: the feature is supported but not active.

cases.name: generated_columns_supported_active_empty_commit_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7)+[generatedColumns] table with a delta.generationExpression column succeeds.

cases.name: generated_columns_create_table_3_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[generatedColumns] table with a delta.generationExpression column succeeds.

cases.name: generated_columns_read_snapshot_1_4_with_schema_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (1,4) table with a delta.generationExpression column succeeds: generatedColumns is writer-only.

cases.name: generated_columns_read_snapshot_3_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[generatedColumns] table with a delta.generationExpression column succeeds: generatedColumns is writer-only.

cases.name: generated_columns_supported_not_active_read_snapshot_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[generatedColumns] table without any delta.generationExpression column succeeds: the feature is supported but not active.

cases.name: generated_columns_empty_commit_1_4_with_schema_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (1,4) table with a delta.generationExpression column succeeds: generatedColumns are always supported at writer version 4.

cases.name: generated_columns_create_table_3_7_nonexistent_column_fails
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[generatedColumns] table with a generation expression referencing a column not in the schema fails.

cases.name: generated_columns_create_table_3_7_partition_column_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[generatedColumns] table with a generated column listed as a partition column succeeds.

cases.name: generated_columns_cm_create_table_3_7_both_features_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[columnMapping,generatedColumns] table with CM-annotated columns and a generation expression using the logical column name succeeds.

cases.name: generated_columns_cm_empty_commit_3_7_both_features_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7)+[columnMapping,generatedColumns] table with CM-annotated columns and a generation expression using the logical column name succeeds.

cases.name: generated_columns_check_constraints_create_table_3_7_both_features_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[generatedColumns,checkConstraints] table with both a generation expression and a check constraint succeeds.
